Name: External Temperature at Time of Failure
A-B-A Swap Method Confirmation
tvnt__Response__c:
The A‑B Swap Method is a simple cross‑check test, which can confirm the observed issue is not systemic.				_x000D_
1. Replace the suspected component (A) from the original failing panel.				_x000D_
2. Replace the suspected component (A) with a known good component  (B) and check if the hte panel now working properly.				_x000D_
3. Replace known good component (B) with original component (A), see if the same failure occurs.				_x000D_
4. if failure reoccurs reinstall component (B) if the failure does not repeat keep component (A) installed and continue troubleshooting.
